title: Craftable Enchants
body:
# CRAFTABLE ENCHANTS

(Forge / Fabric) 

[![Donations ❤](https://i.imgur.com/IQZ7IrP.png)](https://ko-fi.com/confusedmodder)

This is my first mod, of craftable enchantments!

The mod is pretty much self explanatory, it allows you to craft enchantment books in crafting tables, making them easier to obtain.

Please note that for enchantments with tiers, e.g. Unbreaking, only the top tier has a recipe (Unbreaking III has a recipe but Unbreaking II does not).

To craft a book, use the recipies below, or use JEI.

Once you have crafted an enchantment book, you can either Sneak + Click to recieve the book, or you can convert it into a Plus Enchantment.



### Plus Enchantments (Forge Only)

 

"Plus Enchantments" are enchantment books with tiers higher than what vanilla would allow.

For most plus enchantments, the new maximum tier is double the original tier e.g Protection IV --> Protection VIII.

To craft a plus enchantment, you must use a crafted enchantment book, and then add a netherite ingot in the smithing table.

![Smithing](https://i.imgur.com/jjJhBHx.png)

 
### Recipes

![Recipes](https://i.imgur.com/gxweO7N.png)
